memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from Complete Peerage, v 5 p 308 footnote e

Ferrers.  Cecilia de Muscegros.  She held, in co. Gloucester, the manor of Bicknor of the King in chief, by serjeanty and the service of 15s. a year; …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor於1235年8月10日出生在英國英格蘭肯特比可諾時，她的父親William de Avenal32歲，母親Aline Bicknor23歲。她於大約1251年與John de Muscegros在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1301年8月18日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor于1235年8月10日出生在英国英格兰肯特比可諾时，她的父亲William de Avenal32岁，母亲Aline Bicknor23岁。她于大约1251年与John de Muscegros在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1301年8月18日在英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Avenal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alberto, Ana, Arturo, Blanca, Domingo, Felipe, Francisco, Gerado, Gerardo, Gilberto, Guillermo.  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Antonio, Carmine, Giuseppe, Leonardo, Vito, Carmela, Ettore, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian and Spanish: metonymic occupational name for a grain grower or merchant, from avena ‘oats, oatmeal’ (from Latin avena).
Italian: habitational name from a place in Calabria called Avena.

variants.name: Aveni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Domenic, Enza, Gino, Pasquale, Philomena, Vincenzo.  Spanish Elva, Nestor, Ricardo, Rosario.
Italian: either a metonymic occupational name for a seller of oats (see Avena ) or from the Latin personal name Avenius.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Polish: variant of   Lada  .
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Grzegorz, Irena, Lucyna, Witold.

Polish (mainly Łada) and Czech (Moravian): from a short form of the Polish personal name Ładysław, Czech Ladislav, both from Vladislav (Latinized as Ladislaus), a Slavic name composed of the elements vlad ‘to rule’ (from Old Slavic vlasti, later vladati) + slav ‘glory’ or ‘famous’ (from slava ‘glory’). Compare 2 below.
Hungarian: from Lad(a), a short form of the personal name Ladomér, a Hungarian form of Slavic Vladimir (see Lado 2, compare 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

variants.name: Orff
meanings: German: variant of   Orf  .

nameMeanings.name: Bricknor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Yiddish brik ‘bridge’ + the suffix -ner; artificial name or perhaps an occupational name for a bridge keeper.
Altered form of German Brückner (see Bruckner ).

variants.name: Bruckner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Albrecht, Arno, Gunther, Hans, Helmut, Juergen, Kurt, Markus, Oskar, Wolfgang.
German (also Brückner): occupational name for someone in charge of a bridge, typically a toll collector; a variant of Bruck with the addition of the suffix -ner.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a paver, from Yiddish bruk ‘pavement’ + the agent suffix -ner.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor was born on 10 August 1235, in Bicknor, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Avenal, was 32 and her mother, Aline Bicknor, was 23. She married John de Muscegros about 1251, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 18 August 1301, in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor est née le 10 août 1235, à Bicknor, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Avenal, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Aline Bicknor, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John de Muscegros environ 1251, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 août 1301, à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor am 10. August 1235 in Bicknor, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Avenal 32 und ihre Mutter Aline Bicknor 23. Sie hat um 1251 in England, United Kingdom John de Muscegros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 18. August 1301 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor è nata il il 10 agosto 1235 nel Bicknor, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Avenal, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Aline Bicknor, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John de Muscegros circa 1251, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 18 agosto 1301, nel Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknorが1235年8月10日にイギリスイギリスケントビクノーで生まれた時，父William de Avenalは32歳，母Aline Bicknorは23歳であった。約1251年にイギリスイギリスでJohn de Muscegrosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1301年8月18日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor(이)가 1235년 8월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 바이c너에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Avenal(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline Bicknor(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1251년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John de Muscegros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 8월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1235, em Bicknor, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Avenal, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Aline Bicknor, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Muscegros aproximadamente 1251, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1301, em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor родилась 10 августа 1235 г. в местности биккнор, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Avenal было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Aline Bicknor, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Muscegros около 1251 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 18 августа 1301 г. в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Cecily de Avenal - Lady of Bricknor nació el 10 de agosto de 1235, en Bicknor, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Avenal, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Aline Bicknor, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John de Muscegros aproximadamente 1251, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1301, en Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
